articles.title_en: Russia’s three biggest online marketplaces ban fuel sales
articles.lead_en: Avito, Ozon, and Wildberries banned fuel sales on their platforms at the request of the Federal Antimonopoly Service (FAS), the Russian state news agency RIA Novosti reported, citing a statement from the antimonopoly service.
articles.title_raw: Russia’s three biggest online marketplaces ban fuel sales
articles.lead_raw: Avito, Ozon, and Wildberries banned fuel sales on their platforms at the request of the Federal Antimonopoly Service (FAS), the Russian state news agency RIA Novosti reported, citing a statement from the antimonopoly service.

articles.title_en: The Russian stock market closed with a decline in the main indices
articles.lead_en: In part, the market is reacting to a slowdown in the rate of sequestration of the Central Bank’s key rate, and in part to a decline in oil prices, explained BCS World of Investments expert Andrei Smirnov
articles.title_raw: Российский рынок акций закрылся снижением основных индексов
articles.lead_raw: Отчасти рынок реагирует на замедление темпа секвестра ключевой ставки ЦБ, отчасти - на снижение цен на нефть, пояснил эксперт "БКС мир инвестиций" Андрей Смирнов

articles.title_en: Russian governor urges residents to drive less due to ‘temporary difficulties’ with gasoline
articles.lead_en: Vladimir region Governor Alexander Avdeyev has urged residents to limit personal car travel and buy gasoline “only in the amounts immediately necessary” — a statement he made after an emergency meeting of the regional government on fuel shortages at gas stations.
articles.title_raw: Russian governor urges residents to drive less due to ‘temporary difficulties’ with gasoline
articles.lead_raw: Vladimir region Governor Alexander Avdeyev has urged residents to limit personal car travel and buy gasoline “only in the amounts immediately necessary” — a statement he made after an emergency meeting of the regional government on fuel shortages at gas stations.

articles.title_en: Kremlin spokesman comments on fuel prices, Starmer’s resignation, Zelensky’s threats
articles.lead_en: Dmitry Peskov said the Russian government is taking measures to address fuel prices and remains in close coordination with oil companies
articles.title_raw: Kremlin spokesman comments on fuel prices, Starmer’s resignation, Zelensky’s threats
articles.lead_raw: Dmitry Peskov said the Russian government is taking measures to address fuel prices and remains in close coordination with oil companies

articles.title_en: Russia discussed Gazprom's sale of NIS stake with Serbia — Kremlin
articles.lead_en: Dmitry Peskov said these are commercial contacts, the content of which should not be made public

articles.lead_raw: Dmitry Peskov said these are commercial contacts, the content of which should not be made public

articles.title_en: Russian deputy PM orders preparations for domestic fuel market stability plan
articles.lead_en: The Federal Antimonopoly Service was tasked with continuing constant monitoring of the pricing situation in the sector and, if necessary, promptly taking appropriate measures
articles.title_raw: Russian deputy PM orders preparations for domestic fuel market stability plan
articles.lead_raw: The Federal Antimonopoly Service was tasked with continuing constant monitoring of the pricing situation in the sector and, if necessary, promptly taking appropriate measures

articles.title_en: Russian oil companies boost fuel output, launch new capacities
articles.lead_en: Deputy Prime Minister Alexander Novak instructed relevant agencies to prepare a balanced action plan to maintain the stability of the domestic fuel market
articles.title_raw: Russian oil companies boost fuel output, launch new capacities
articles.lead_raw: Deputy Prime Minister Alexander Novak instructed relevant agencies to prepare a balanced action plan to maintain the stability of the domestic fuel market

articles.title_en: Russian Antitrust Service Enlists E-Commerce Sites to Block Speculative Fuel Resales
articles.lead_en: Avito has temporarily hidden all fuel-trading ads, while online marketplaces Ozon and Wildberries have banned gasoline sales outright.
articles.title_raw: Russian Antitrust Service Enlists E-Commerce Sites to Block Speculative Fuel Resales
articles.lead_raw: Avito has temporarily hidden all fuel-trading ads, while online marketplaces Ozon and Wildberries have banned gasoline sales outright.

articles.title_en: Peskov: Russia discussed with Serbia the sale of NiS by Gazprom
articles.lead_en: The Kremlin representative stressed that these are commercial non-public contacts
articles.title_raw: Песков: РФ обсуждала с Сербией продажу NiS "Газпромом"
articles.lead_raw: Представитель Кремля подчеркнул, что это коммерческие непубличные контакты

articles.title_en: Peskov: the Russian Federation is working to provide the population with fuel
articles.title_raw: Песков: в РФ ведут работу, чтобы наладить обеспечение населения топливом

articles.title_en: The Russian Armed Forces hit an oil depot used by the Ukrainian Armed Forces in the Zaporozhye region
articles.lead_en: The Russian Ministry of Defense showed footage of objective control
articles.title_raw: ВС РФ поразили используемую ВСУ нефтебазу в Запорожской области
articles.lead_raw: Минобороны РФ показало кадры объективного контроля

articles.title_en: Gazprombank Autoleasing announced an increase in sales of Russian cars
articles.lead_en: Over five months, 199 thousand new domestic passenger cars were purchased, which is 31% more than in the same period in 2025
articles.title_raw: "Газпромбанк автолизинга" заявил о росте продаж российских машин
articles.lead_raw: За пять месяцев были куплены 199 тыс. новых отечественных легковых авто, что на 31% больше, чем за аналогичный период 2025 года

articles.title_en: Russian Geran drones wipes out Ukrainian fuel depot in Dnepropetrovsk Region
articles.lead_en: The strikes were followed by a strong fire, the Russian defense ministry said
articles.title_raw: Russian Geran drones wipes out Ukrainian fuel depot in Dnepropetrovsk Region
articles.lead_raw: The strikes were followed by a strong fire, the Russian defense ministry said

articles.title_en: The Russian Armed Forces "Geraniums" destroyed a fuel depot of the Ukrainian Armed Forces in the Dnepropetrovsk region
articles.lead_en: The impact destroyed several fuel storage facilities, the Russian Ministry of Defense noted.
articles.title_raw: ВС РФ "Геранями" уничтожили склад топлива ВСУ в Днепропетровской области
articles.lead_raw: При ударе было разрушено несколько объектов хранилища ГСМ, отметили в Минобороны РФ

articles.title_en: Crimea halts all public gasoline sales, restricts fuel to government agencies
articles.lead_en: All gas stations in Crimea have completely stopped selling fuel, both for general sale and on ration coupons, announced Sergei Aksyonov, the Russian-installed head of the peninsula.
articles.title_raw: Crimea halts all public gasoline sales, restricts fuel to government agencies
articles.lead_raw: All gas stations in Crimea have completely stopped selling fuel, both for general sale and on ration coupons, announced Sergei Aksyonov, the Russian-installed head of the peninsula.

articles.title_en: Ukrainian Strikes on Russian-Annexed Crimea Kill 4, Pause Fuel Sales
articles.lead_en: Ukraine said it targeted military and energy facilities in Crimea in one of the biggest attacks on the peninsula in recent months.
articles.title_raw: Ukrainian Strikes on Russian-Annexed Crimea Kill 4, Pause Fuel Sales
articles.lead_raw: Ukraine said it targeted military and energy facilities in Crimea in one of the biggest attacks on the peninsula in recent months.

articles.title_en: The Russian Armed Forces hit oil refining facilities and the fuel and energy complex of Ukraine

articles.title_en: Russian forces strike Ukraine’s key energy sites in Kiev, Sumy, Chernigov regions, DPR
articles.lead_en: The Russian Armed Forces used Gerbera drones, the Defense Ministry reported
articles.title_raw: Russian forces strike Ukraine’s key energy sites in Kiev, Sumy, Chernigov regions, DPR

articles.title_en: The Russian Armed Forces hit important energy facilities used by the Armed Forces of Ukraine
articles.lead_en: In particular, Russian troops hit targets in the Kyiv, Sumy, and Chernigov regions
articles.title_raw: ВС РФ поразили важные используемые ВСУ энергообъекты
